# Emily Flocke — emilyflocke.blog

A blog. Not submitted to search engines; shared by direct link only.

RSS: /rss.xml

## Full content in one page (no link-following required)

- / — Home page. All Signal posts are on this page; full text is in the HTML. Expand sections to read. For LLMs and crawlers that cannot or do not follow links.
- /read — Redirects to / (same content).
- /signal — Hub and post list (links to individual posts)
- /about — About this site

## Other sections

- /on-learning — Coming soon
- /working-on — Coming soon

- Alex — Agent Support & Development
- Sloane — Project Leadership
- Elara — Backend/API
- Cai — Frontend
- Nova — Infrastructure/Deployment
- Jules — Design/UX
- CeCe — QA/Compliance
- Riley — Requirements/Evaluation
- Devin — Process/Documentation
- Amala — Database Architecture
